scripts.plonk: rm -rf build && circom circuits/access_control_optimized.circom --r1cs --wasm --sym -o build && cd build && snarkjs powersoftau new bn128 15 pot15_0000.ptau -v && snarkjs powersoftau contribute pot15_0000.ptau pot15_final.ptau --name="setup" -v && snarkjs plonk setup access_control_optimized.r1cs pot15_final.ptau access_control.zkey && snarkjs zkey export verificationkey access_control.zkey verification_key.json && cd access_control_optimized_js && node generate_witness.js access_control_optimized.wasm ../../input_optimized.json witness.wtns && snarkjs plonk prove ../access_control.zkey witness.wtns proof.json public.json && snarkjs plonk verify ../verification_key.json public.json proof.json
